tasks.title: Update Mobile, Home phone number & address on TalentKonnect
Connect with your Buddy

tasks.title: New Joiner Independence Confirmation Affidavit
tasks.description: For Assistant Managers and below KGS (2026). Complete the declaration on the Ask Risk portal.
tasks.remark: When was going through the questionnaire, and got engaged with some other things, realized the session got stuck. Raised ticket in 'Ask Risk' portal which then got assigned to some executive. Next day, when I tried to access the link, it was working and completed the declaration.

tasks.title: Sign employment contract

tasks.remark: It's locked and will open in the first week of April

tasks.remark: Completed all the details in the portal
